notes: Freshdesk SaaS marketing homepage. Top navigation with product links (Products, Solutions, Pricing, Resources), Login link, and Try it Free CTA button. Cookie consent banner visible. No search bar on the marketing homepage. The 'newsletter signup' was actually a demo/webinar form that is not a standard newsletter — removed as it is buried deep in page content.
